name: Dungeon Quest!
description:
A lewd, seemingly endless dungeon! Filled to the brim with treasure, lewdity, magic, and creatues! This bot is any pov, so any monster fucker can give it a try, its also has a stat system!! <3
<------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------>
More info about this bot.

In this story, you are a adventurer who just so happened to be low on gold...and due to it being medieval times, you are constantly getting taxed to hell! With no special talents you decide to try your shot at a dungeon, you hear of brave squads and adventurers coming out of them with heaps of treasure all the time! If they can do it, so can you...right?

But, the dungeon you go to happens to be an SSS+ ranked dungeon, cursed by depravity and lewdity by a supreme grade succubus! something it would be more wise to send a military into rather than one single adventurer, but you don't know that. Although the dangers are immense, filled to the brim with every creature, some geared with magical equipment, the treasures you can find are just as invigorating~

In this dungeon you'll find the basic creatures from orcs, goblins, slime monsters, elves, centaurs, spider humans, giant insects, succubi/succubus, kobolds, werewolves, tentacle creatures, to things like eldritch horrors, what you find is also honestly up to you, as you can self insert pretty much any creature you want!

The stat system i mentioned will keep track of things like stamina, health, lust, corruption, debuffs, buffs from armor/equipment, titles, armor and equipment can give debuffs, or buffs, mainly being lewd but its possible to find non lewd gear, sometimes the bot will check your stats every message, or not at all, i've tired to make it balanced but its fairly hard, when you want a full review of your character say "user full check stat/debuff/buff/gear/title" that is what seems to work for me after about 2-3 hours of testing.

The bot is pretty much meant to be used as you are playing a very lewd dnd type rpg, the bot also has a "bad ending" feature for those who are into that, although i didn't get to test it much, as i only did two test runs, but if your corruption is 100+ in encounters/scenarios where you are losing/ect you can get a bad end, you can also just say "bad ending check" or "bad ending start" if the bot is being stupid.

UPDATE i tweaked the bad end system so it should work better now, i also added "dev mode" which allows you to try everything out and use the bot like a console of sorts, when you want to enter it just say "dev mode" and when you want to exit say "dev mode exit"
<------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------>
other things to note

The stat system probably won't always work correctly, as the JLLM (or any LLM really) won't always be perfect, i would recommend frequently copy and pasting your current stats into the chat memory.

If the bot speaks for you try writing longer, more detailed replies, or even putting something into the custom LLM that tells it to never speak for you, read your mind, write shorter/longer than, ect. It won't always follow those rules, but if it doesn't make sure to just reset its message, i've noticed that once it ignores those rules and you move on to the next message, it will continue and not stop, making you either deal with it or reset the chat, i use janitor-ai's LLM, so this info speaks for that.

I really tried to implement a "lewd gear" kind of thing to this bot, i don't really know the name of the fetish but the character photo can give you an idea, honestly not sure how well that works either, if it works at all, how descriptive the bot is, creative, ect. Let me know how it works for you and i might do some tweaks later.

Bot forgets your persona, gender, appearance, ect? Paste it int
creator: fartknocker43
